graphs.query:
task.type = 'RemoteOps' artifact.type != 'stdout' RecordType = 'PackageInfo'
| group NbPackages=count() by PackageUser
graphs.title: NPM Packages by User

graphs.query:
task.type = 'RemoteOps' artifact.type != 'stdout' RecordType = 'PackageInfo'
| group NbPackages=count() by PackageSource
graphs.title: NPM Packages by Source (npm, nvm, fnm, Volta, n)

graphs.query:
task.type = 'RemoteOps' artifact.type != 'stdout' RecordType = 'PackageInfo'
| group NbPackages=count() by PackageLicense
graphs.title: NPM Packages by License

graphs.query:
task.type = 'RemoteOps' artifact.type != 'stdout' RecordType = 'PackageInfo'
| group NbPackages=count() by PackageNodeVersion
graphs.title: NPM Packages by Node.js Version

graphs.query:
task.type = 'RemoteOps' artifact.type != 'stdout' RecordType = 'PackageInfo'
| columns PackageUser, PackageName, PackageVersion, PackageScope, PackageSource, PackageLicense, PackageHasBin, PackageNodeVersion, PackageLastModified
| sort -PackageLastModified
graphs.title: All NPM Packages Inventory

graphs.query:
task.type = 'RemoteOps' artifact.type != 'stdout' RecordType = 'PackageInfo' PackageHasBin = 'true'
| columns PackageUser, PackageName, PackageVersion, PackageSource, PackageAuthor, PackageHomepage, PackageInstallPath, PackageLastModified
| sort -PackageLastModified
graphs.title: Packages with CLI Binaries

graphs.query:
task.type = 'RemoteOps' artifact.type != 'stdout' RecordType = 'PackageInfo'
| columns PackageUser, PackageName, PackageVersion, PackageSource, PackageAuthor, PackageDescription, PackageHomepage, PackageInstallPath, PackageInstallDate, PackageLastModified
| sort -PackageLastModified
graphs.title: Recently Modified Packages (Full Details)

graphs.query:
task.type = 'RemoteOps' artifact.type != 'stdout' RecordType = 'EndpointInfo'
| columns EndpointHostname, EndpointOS, EndpointOSVersion, EndpointOSBuild, EndpointCollectionDate
graphs.title: Endpoint Metadata

description: Inventory of globally installed npm packages collected across user profiles, version managers (nvm, fnm, Volta, n), and system-wide Node.js installations
